title: Senior Instructional Designer at Great Learning

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Great Learning
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!
